title: intense ukrainian duck tagine
description: a flavorful and aromatic duck tagine from ukraine, featuring gorgonzola-dolce and a variety of herbs
instructions: season the duck breast with salt and pepper, and set aside
heat the olive oil in the bottom of a tagine or large Dutch oven over medium heat
add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes
add the chopped garlic and cook for an additional minute
add the chopped carrot and celery, and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes
add the chopped rosemary and thyme, and cook for 1 minute
add the duck breast to the tagine, and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes
add the white wine and chicken broth to the tagine, and bring to a simmer
cover the tagine and transfer to the oven, where it will cook for 25-30 minutes, or until the duck is cooked through
remove the tagine from the oven, and let it cool slightly
stir in the chopped fresh parsley and crumbled gorgonzola dolce
serve the duck and sauce over couscous or rice
